description:
Local Docker stack manager for PHP development on Windows.

WSDD is a Windows desktop application for provisioning and operating local Docker PHP stacks, with Classic Bind, Native Linux, Managed Native Linux, and Fast Sync storage modes, optional ngrok publishing, bundled resources, and environment helpers.
Adds Managed Native Linux Storage with validated ZIP snapshot conversion, automatic WSL runtime recovery, Linux runtime permission repair, and mixed-DPI multi-monitor window fixes.
